buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm p-6 transition-all duration-200

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

hero_abstract.usage: Hero section background or decorative element

lab_research.usage: About section or 'How it works' visualization

scientist_working.usage: User persona representation or empty state

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px, consistent size (w-4 h-4, w-5 h-5, w-6 h-6)

contrast.rule: Ensure text has at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio against background.
contrast.interactive: Focus states must be clearly visible with ring or border change.

general: Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless specified.
Avoid 'Inter' for headings; use 'IBM Plex Sans'.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all scores, IDs, and data metrics.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and focus states.
Use the 'Tetris' grid for the landing page and 'Control Room' grid for the tournament dashboard.
Implement a 'Light Mode' first approach, but support 'Dark Mode' via Tailwind classes.
implementation_steps: 1. Configure Tailwind theme with the specified colors and fonts.
2. Create the layout shell (Navbar, Footer, Main Container).
3. Build the 'Home' page using the Tetris grid and Topic selection cards.
4. Build the 'Tournament' page with the Control Room grid (Bracket view, Log feed, Stats).
5. Implement the 'Bracket' component using SVG connectors and Flexbox/Grid.
6. Build the 'Results' page with a ranked list/table.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for overlays.
Do NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all).
Do NOT center align the app container.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
